perturbation.original_text: Ross & Moncure recognizes Confidential Information to be any information or personal data that it receives from the Client in the process of tax preparation or planning .
perturbation.changed_text: Ross & Moncure recognizes Confidential Information to be any information or business related data that it receives from the Client in the process of tax preparation or planning .
perturbation.explanation: Changing "personal data" to "business related data" creates an ambiguity. The original text clearly identifies that personal data is part of Confidential Information. Now, it is uncertain if personal data received from the client is still considered Confidential Information. This change affects the data protection requirements mentioned later in the agreement. Section 3 is the location where the contradiction is evident because it explicitly mention the protection and responsability towards personal data
perturbation.contradicted_text: Ross & Moncure shall notify the undersigned Client immediately upon discovery of any unauthorized use or disclosure of Confidential Information or any other breach of this Agreement by an employee of Ross & Moncure , and will cooperate with the Disclosing Party in every reasonable way to help the Disclosing Party to regain possession of the Confidential Information and prevent its further unauthorized use or disclosure. Ross & Moncure shall bear the burden of any damages arising from negligence and/or lack of confidentiality, improper use, processing or communication of personal data, or any other infringeme nt of data protection rules. The full extent of these damages shall be determined by a court of competent jurisdiction.
perturbation.justification: The original text includes 'personal data' as part of 'Confidential Information'. The changed text replaces 'personal data' with 'business related data,' creating uncertainty about whether personal data is still considered 'Confidential Information.' The contradicted text explicitly states Ross & Moncure's responsibilities regarding the 'improper use, processing or communication of personal data'. If personal data is no longer clearly defined as Confidential Information because of the change, Ross & Moncure's responsibilities and liabilities related to personal data are ambiguous, creating a direct conflict. The changed text weakens the data protection obligations regarding personal data in a way that breaks compatibility with the contradicted section where Ross & Moncure is fully liable for the 'improper use, processing or communication of personal data'.

perturbation.original_text: Ross & Moncure pledges not to disclose any information to which it has access in the process of the performance of a Client engagement.
perturbation.changed_text: Ross & Moncure pledges not to disclose any information to which it has access in the process of the performance of a Client project.
perturbation.explanation: By changing "Client engagement" to "Client project", the agreement introduces uncertainty. Are 'engagements' and 'projects' the same thing? This affects the scope of the non-disclosure obligation. If they aren't the same it can give room for legal action by clients where they could argue that an engagement does not cover a project, so information could be disclosed. The obligations in Section 2 are directly impacted because it defines what Ross & Moncure is allowed to do with the data.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Obligations Regarding Confidential Information. Ross & Moncure pledges not to disclose any information to which it has access in the process of the performance of a Client project. Ross & Moncure also agrees to only request of the Client information necessary to carry out services requested by the Client. Ross & Moncure shall process information and data provided in accordance with the instructions given by the Client and shall refr ain from recording, reproducing, or storing data for superfluous reasons. This prohibition affects both hard -copy data and data on any electronic, magn etic, analogue or digital medium . Under no circumstances may it disclose such data to third parties witho ut written authorization from the Client, even merely for safekeeping. Ross & Moncure recognizes that the duties of secrecy and non -disclosure continue to apply indefinitely even after all service engagements have terminated. Ross & Moncure undertakes to take and maintain the technical and organizational steps required to guarantee data security and prevent their alteration, loss and unauthorized processing or access, according to the security level required pursuant to the aforementioned legislation. T hese steps refer to the files, processing centers, premises, equipment, systems, programs and people involved in processing. Once the contractual service has been performed, Ross & Moncure agrees to hand back to the Client all of the raw data used in tax planning upon the Client’s written request. Ross & 726 North Washington Street | Alexandria, VA 22314 | Fax (703) 549- 6517 | Phone (703) 549- 5276 | www.rossmoncure.com | tax@rossmoncure.com Moncure does not agree to hand back and destroy copies of completed tax returns, as the American Institute of Certified Public Accountants and the Association for Accounting Administration both dictate th at best practice is to keep this work on hand .
perturbation.justification: The original text refers to 'Client engagement,' while the changed text uses 'Client project.' The explanation states that this change introduces uncertainty because 'engagements' and 'projects' may not be the same. The contradicted text uses 'Client project.' Therefore, the change from 'engagement' to 'project' creates a contradiction, as it introduces ambiguity about whether the obligations regarding confidential information extend to both engagements and projects, or only projects. This ambiguity directly impacts the scope of the non-disclosure agreement, creating a strong in-text contradiction as 'engagement' might not be covered.

perturbation.original_text: Once the contractual service has been performed, Ross & Moncure agrees to hand back to the Client all of the raw data used in tax planning upon the Client’s written request.
perturbation.changed_text: Once the contractual agreement has been fulfilled, Ross & Moncure agrees to hand back to the Client all of the raw data used in tax preparation upon the Client’s written request.
perturbation.explanation: Changing "contractual service" to "contractual agreement" and "tax planning" to "tax preparation" introduces ambiguity. The original text implies that a service of tax planning is different to tax preparation, even if they are the same. The obligation to return data may now be interpreted as only applying to tax preparation data but not for tax planning. The change creates a contradiction in Section 2 because the agreement needs to state what falls under 'tax preparation' and 'tax planning'
perturbation.contradicted_text: Obligations Regarding Confidential Information. Ross & Moncure pledges not to disclose any information to which it has access in the process of the performance of a Client engagement. Ross & Moncure also agrees to only request of the Client information necessary to carry out services requested by the Client. Ross & Moncure shall process information and data provided in accordance with the instructions given by the Client and shall refr ain from recording, reproducing, or storing data for superfluous reasons. This prohibition affects both hard -copy data and data on any electronic, magn etic, analogue or digital medium . Under no circumstances may it disclose such data to third parties witho ut written authorization from the Client, even merely for safekeeping. Ross & Moncure recognizes that the duties of secrecy and non -disclosure continue to apply indefinitely even after all service engagements have terminated. Ross & Moncure undertakes to take and maintain the technical and organizational steps required to guarantee data security and prevent their alteration, loss and unauthorized processing or access, according to the security level required pursuant to the aforementioned legislation. T hese steps refer to the files, processing centers, premises, equipment, systems, programs and people involved in processing. Once the contractual agreement has been fulfilled, Ross & Moncure agrees to hand back to the Client all of the raw data used in tax preparation upon the Client’s written request. Ross & 726 North Washington Street | Alexandria, VA 22314 | Fax (703) 549- 6517 | Phone (703) 549- 5276 | www.rossmoncure.com | tax@rossmoncure.com Moncure does not agree to hand back and destroy copies of completed tax returns, as the American Institute of Certified Public Accountants and the Association for Accounting Administration both dictate th at best practice is to keep this work on hand .
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies "contractual service" to "contractual agreement" and "tax planning" to "tax preparation". The explanation states that this change introduces ambiguity and implies that tax planning and tax preparation are different services. The obligation to return data may now be interpreted as only applying to tax preparation data but not for tax planning. The changed text contradicts the contradicted text because 'tax preparation' has a new limited meaning.

perturbation.original_text: Ross & Moncure shall bear the burden of any damages arising from negligence and/or lack of confidentiality, improper use, processing or communication of personal data, or any other infringeme nt of data protection rules.
perturbation.changed_text: Ross & Moncure shall bear the burden of any damages arising from negligence and/or lack of confidentiality, unauthorized use, processing or communication of personal data, or any other infringeme nt of data protection laws.
perturbation.explanation: Changing "improper use" to "unauthorized use" and "data protection rules" to "data protection laws" alters the standard of liability. 'Improper' is more subjective than 'unauthorized.' Also rules are different than laws. This creates an in-text contradiction since the original text is changed and it's not clear what 'data protection laws' are. This could lead to legal action as the agreement needs to be clear in which laws it is referring. The contradictory section is Section 3, as the agreement needs to define 'data protection laws'.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Ross & Moncure shall notify the undersigned Client immediately upon discovery of any unauthorized use or disclosure of Confidential Information or any other breach of this Agreement by an employee of Ross & Moncure , and will cooperate with the Disclosing Party in every reasonable way to help the Disclosing Party to regain possession of the Confidential Information and prevent its further unauthorized use or disclosure. Ross & Moncure shall bear the burden of any damages arising from negligence and/or lack of confidentiality, unauthorized use, processing or communication of personal data, or any other infringeme nt of data protection laws. The full extent of these damages shall be determined by a court of competent jurisdiction.
perturbation.justification: The change from "improper use" to "unauthorized use" and "data protection rules" to "data protection laws" alters the standard of liability. 'Improper' is more subjective than 'unauthorized.' Also rules are different than laws. The contradicted text includes the new term 'data protection laws' as well. The introduction of 'data protection laws' without defining it, and also changing it from 'rules', creates ambiguity and thus contradiction with the contradicted text since it is not clear which 'data protection laws' are being referenced. This ambiguity directly impacts the interpretation and enforceability of the clause, leading to a strong contradiction.
